mapper.insert: insert into seat (seat_code, area_id, hour_price, seat_image, seat_description, status, has_socket, has_window, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{seatCode}, #{areaId}, #{hourPrice}, #{seatImage}, #{seatDescription}, #{status}, #{hasSocket}, #{hasWindow}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select s.id, s.seat_code, s.area_id, a.name as area_name, coalesce(s.hour_price, 0) as hour_price, s.seat_image as image, s.seat_description, s.status, s.has_socket, s.has_window, s.create_time, s.update_time from seat s left join area a on s.area_id = a.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.seat_code, s.area_id, a.name as area_name, coalesce(s.hour_price, 0) as hour_price, s.seat_image as image, s.seat_description, s.status, s.has_socket, s.has_window, s.create_time, s.update_time from seat s left join area a on s.area_id = a.id where s.status = 1 order by s.area_id, s.seat_code
